Choose a template when opening your pull request:

| Change | Template | Label |
|--------|----------|-------|
| Add a new study (after `proposal-approved`) | [new-study](?expand=1&template=new-study.md) | `new-study` |
| Edit an existing study | [study-update](?expand=1&template=study-update.md) | `study-update` |
| Change draft ↔ released | [status-change](?expand=1&template=status-change.md) | `status-change` |

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full workflow.
